reviews.comment:
Clásico restaurant del ACA. Nos atendieron rápido e hicieron un lugar en una mesa, siendo bastante tarde por la noche. Buena relación precio calidad y hacen el descuento para socios.

(Translated by Google)
Classic ACA restaurant. We were served quickly and they made room for us at a table, even though it was quite late at night. Good value for money and they offer a discount for members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhNmZwVBAB

reviews.comment:
De lo peor que te podes encontrar en la ruta , ingresamos a las 22 a cenar 4 personas esperamos una hora el pedido en la mesa , y cuando nos trae el pedido nos avisa a la hora que no tenía lo que pidió uno de los 4 //  la comida horrible ! Atención pésima ,  mucha gente no se cumplen protocolos !

(Translated by Google)
One of the worst places you can find on the road. We went in at 10 PM for dinner (four of us), waited an hour for our order, and when it finally arrived, they told us they didn't have what one of us had ordered. The food was awful! Terrible service, lots of people, and they weren't following the protocols!

reviewReply.comment:
Buenas noches en primer lugar le pedimos disculpa por el inconveniente que tuvo es nuestro establecimiento. Nos gustaria reparar el mal momento que paso. Le doy el correo electronico motel.santarosaaca@hotmail.com, para que se contacte.
Muchas gracias. Y disculpas

reviews.comment:
Es una estación mediana pero completa, con el acostumbrado buen servicio del ACA, junto a ella funciona un agradable motel.

(Translated by Google)
It is a medium-sized but well-equipped station, with the usual good ACA service, and there is a pleasant motel next to it.

reviews.comment:
En el bar del ACA no me hicieron ningún tipo de descuento por ser socio. El mozo sin ninguna predisposición para atender. El playero de la parte de combustible 10 puntos. Me hizo descuento correspondiente.

(Translated by Google)
At the ACA bar, they didn't give me any kind of discount for being a member. The waiter was completely unhelpful. The gas station attendant was excellent. He gave me the appropriate discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MC1IUFpREAE
